description: CompositionMaroon tunic made of 100% viscose, has three-quarter sleeves with stitch detailing at the cuffs, mandarin collar with a split neck, yoke till the waist with cross stitch detailing and piping, slightly ruched from the waist down, full front button placket and a front split seamFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis simple yet stylish printed tunic from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western tunic blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas, leggings or even jeggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
